query:
SELECT ms.id, ms.aluno_id, ms.task_mode, ms.task_id, ms.custom_task_title, tl.nome as task_library_name
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
LEFT JOIN task_library tl ON ms.task_id = tl.id
WHERE ms.task_mode IS NOT NULL AND ms.task_mode != 'sem_tarefa'
ORDER BY ms.id DESC
LIMIT 20;
